title: Using Structs for Disconnected Record Sets
breadcrumbs: Using Structs for Disconnected Record Sets
text: Using Structs for Disconnected Record Sets Structs can be used to hold disconnected record sets, providing an alternative to the use of XML. When componentToStruct is used with the /reconnecttags switch, it generates a Struct that includes tags containing the occurrence metadata that is required to reconnect the data after using structToComponent . For more information, see Occurrence Metadata for Reconnect and Struct Annotations for Uniface Component Data . It is possible to update and manipulate the generated Struct, updating occurrences, adding new fields, and manually changing tags. However, when the modified Struct is loaded into the component with structToComponent , any Struct nodes that cannot be mapped to a corresponding fields, occurrences, or entities will be ignored, as will their tags. For more information, see Disconnected Record Sets . Related Links Struct Annotations for Uniface Component Data When converting between Uniface components and Structs using componentToStruct and structToComponent, you can set and retrieve annotations that provide information about the type of Uniface object and reconnect processing information for occurrences. Occurrence Metadata for Reconnect To manage the exchange of data between components and a database, metadata is maintained about occurrences, such as whether the occurrence is new or already stored in a database. This occurs transparently, so that a programmer generally does not have to handle data state. Reconnect Process The reconnect process merges data in disconnected occurrences (in XML, JSON, or Structs) with data in the component, and resolves the state information that is stored in the modification status attributes. It removes duplicates of occurrences, removes occurrences marked for deletion from the component, and sets the appropriate modification flags. structToComponent Converts data from a Struct or collection of Structs into the entities and occurrences in the component. componentToStruct Writes component data to a Struct.
